{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Queen's communications crystal
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Queen]] uses an expensive communications crystal.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“That was the Queen’s expensive communications crystal,” Simon replied.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
